title: NotebookLM adds agentic research, web source discovery, and code execution
friendlyTitle: NotebookLM can now research, find sources, and run code
summary: Google upgraded NotebookLM with Gemini 3.5, agentic chat, a secure cloud computer that can write and run code, Google Search-based source discovery, and new export formats such as charts, spreadsheets, slide decks, and reports.
friendlySummary: Google upgraded NotebookLM with better chat, web source discovery, code execution, and exports like charts, spreadsheets, slides, and reports.
whyItMatters: Research assistants are becoming workbenches rather than chat boxes. For analysts, students, and teams, the practical gain is source-grounded synthesis that can also calculate, format, and package results.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Research tools are becoming workbenches that can read, calculate, organise, and package results.
